list.title: My Escrows
list.description: View and manage all your escrow contracts
list.error: Failed to load escrows. Please try again later.

noEscrows.title: No escrows found
noEscrows.description: You haven't created or participated in any escrow contracts yet.

allCaughtUp.title: All caught up!
allCaughtUp.description: No escrows require your attention right now.

noActive.title: No active escrows
noActive.descriptionAgent: You are not assigned as an agent to any active escrows.
noActive.description: You don't have any active escrows{role}.

noDisputes.title: No disputes
noDisputes.descriptionAgentFull: No disputes are currently assigned to you for resolution.
noDisputes.description: You don't have any escrows in dispute{role}.

stateDescriptions.PENDING: The escrow is funded and waiting for the seller to accept the terms.
stateDescriptions.ACTIVE: The escrow is active and waiting for the seller to confirm delivery.
stateDescriptions.FULFILLED: The seller has confirmed fulfillment. Buyer can release funds or wait for protection to expire.
stateDescriptions.RELEASED: Funds have been released to the seller. This escrow is complete.
stateDescriptions.DISPUTED: A dispute has been opened. Parties can invite an agent or negotiate a split.
stateDescriptions.AGENT_INVITED: An agent has been invited to resolve the dispute.
stateDescriptions.AGENT_RESOLVED: The agent has resolved the dispute. This escrow is complete.
stateDescriptions.REFUNDED: Funds have been refunded to the buyer. This escrow is complete.
stateDescriptions.SPLIT: Funds have been split between buyer and seller. This escrow is complete.

actionDescriptions.accept: Accept the escrow terms and start the engagement.
actionDescriptions.decline: Decline the escrow and refund the buyer immediately.
actionDescriptions.cancelExpired: The seller did not accept in time. Cancel the escrow and get a refund.
actionDescriptions.confirmFulfillment: Mark the work/delivery as complete and start the buyer protection period.
actionDescriptions.release: Release the escrowed funds to the seller immediately.
actionDescriptions.releaseAfterProtection: The protection period has expired. Claim the funds as the seller.
actionDescriptions.sellerRefund: Return all funds to the buyer. This action cannot be undone.
actionDescriptions.openDispute: Open a dispute to pause the escrow and seek resolution.
actionDescriptions.inviteAgent: Invite the assigned agent to help resolve this dispute.
actionDescriptions.agentResolve: As the agent, decide how to split the funds between parties.
actionDescriptions.claimAgentTimeout: The agent did not respond in time. Return to dispute state.
actionDescriptions.proposeSplit: Propose a split of funds between buyer and seller.
actionDescriptions.approveSplit: Approve the proposed split. If both parties approve, funds are distributed.

accept.title: Accept Escrow
accept.description: You are about to accept the escrow terms. This will activate the escrow.

decline.title: Decline Escrow
decline.description: You are about to decline this escrow. The funds will be refunded to the buyer.

cancelExpired.title: Cancel & Refund
cancelExpired.description: The seller acceptance window has expired. You can cancel the escrow and get a full refund.

release.title: Release Funds
release.description: You are about to release the escrowed funds to the seller. This action cannot be undone.

refund.title: Issue Refund
refund.description: You are about to refund all escrowed funds to the buyer. This action cannot be undone.

dispute.title: Open Dispute
dispute.description: Opening a dispute will pause the escrow and allow you to seek resolution. You can invite an agent or negotiate a split with the seller.

inviteAgent.title: Invite Agent
inviteAgent.description: The assigned agent will be invited to review and resolve this dispute. The agent will have the authority to decide how funds are distributed.

agentResolve.title: Resolve Dispute
agentResolve.description: As the agent, you will determine how the escrowed funds are split between the buyer and seller. Your decision is final.

claimTimeout.title: Claim Agent Timeout
claimTimeout.description: The agent did not respond within the required time. This will return the escrow to the disputed state with no agent assigned.

proposeSplit.title: Propose Split
proposeSplit.description: You are proposing a split of the escrowed funds. If the other party approves, the funds will be distributed automatically.

approveSplit.title: Approve Split
approveSplit.description: You are approving the proposed split. Once confirmed, the funds will be distributed according to the agreed percentages.

detail.switchToNetwork: Switch to {chain} to perform actions on this escrow.
detail.connectToInteract: Connect your wallet to interact with this escrow.
detail.switchToParticipantWallet: Your connected wallet is not the buyer, seller, or agent in this escrow. Please switch to the correct wallet to interact.
detail.noActionsAvailable: No actions available at this time.

protection.sellerCanClaim: The seller can now claim the funds.
protection.sellerCanClaimAfter: The seller can claim funds after this period expires if the buyer doesn't release them.

acceptance.title: Seller Acceptance Window
acceptance.waiting: Waiting for seller to accept the escrow
acceptance.buyerCanCancel: Seller did not accept in time. You can cancel and get a full refund.
acceptance.sellerReview: Please review and accept the escrow terms before the deadline.

agentTimer.title: Agent Response
agentTimer.timedOut: Agent did not respond in time
agentTimer.notRespondedInTime: Agent did not respond in time
agentTimer.canClaimTimeout: You can claim the agent timeout to return to disputed state.
agentTimer.mustResolve: The agent must resolve the dispute before the deadline.

chain.wrongNetworkDesc: This escrow is deployed on {escrowChain}, but your wallet is connected to {walletChain}. Switch networks to interact with this escrow.
chain.unsupportedNetworkDesc: You are connected to {walletChain} which is not supported. This escrow is on {escrowChain}.
chain.testnetDesc: This escrow is on {chain} testnet. Transactions use test tokens only.

split.title: Split Negotiation
split.proposeDescription: Propose a split of the escrowed funds. If both parties approve, the funds will be distributed automatically.
split.waitingForOther: Waiting for the other party to respond to the proposal.

agent.resolveDescription: As the agent, decide how to split the escrowed funds between buyer and seller. Your decision is final and cannot be undone.

create.title: Create New Escrow
create.description: Set up a secure escrow contract for your transaction

sections.sellerAddressDesc: The wallet address that will receive payment
sections.paymentAmountDesc: The amount to be held in escrow
sections.buyerProtectionDesc: Time the buyer has to request a dispute or release funds
sections.contractTermsDesc: Describe the deliverables and conditions for this escrow
sections.disputeAgentDesc: Choose how disputes will be handled

form.termsPlaceholder: Describe what the seller must deliver, deadlines, quality expectations, etc.

summary.title: Quick Summary
summary.noAgentWarning: Without an agent, disputes cannot be resolved.

agentSelector.enterAddressDesc: Input a known agent's address directly
agentSelector.recommendation: We strongly recommend assigning an agent for dispute resolution.
agentSelector.agentVerifiedDesc: Active, available, and has sufficient MAV for this escrow.
agentSelector.agentNotRegisteredDesc: This address is not registered as an agent in the protocol.
agentSelector.agentInactiveDesc: This agent is registered but currently inactive.
agentSelector.agentUnavailableDesc: This agent is active but currently not accepting new cases.
agentSelector.insufficientMavDesc: This agent's MAV is not enough for this escrow amount.
agentSelector.checkingAgentDesc: Fetching agent information from the indexer.

locked.title: Creating a Locked Escrow
locked.subtitle: You are creating an escrow without an agent
locked.understandNoDispute: I understand that disputes cannot be resolved without an agent
locked.understandNoDisputeDesc: If a disagreement occurs, there will be no third party to mediate.
locked.understandFundsLocked: I understand that funds may be permanently locked
locked.understandFundsLockedDesc: If the buyer and seller cannot agree, funds may remain locked forever.
locked.acceptRisk: I accept all risks associated with a locked escrow
locked.acceptRiskDesc: I have read and understood the implications of creating an escrow without an agent.

review.agentAssignedDesc: Disputes will be resolved by the assigned agent
review.lockedEscrowDesc: This escrow has no dispute resolution. If a disagreement occurs, funds may be permanently locked.
review.predictedAddressNote: The predicted address is deterministic. As long as the parameters remain unchanged, the escrow will be deployed at this address.
review.generatingAgreementDesc: Your escrow agreement PDF is being generated. This document will be cryptographically linked to your smart contract.

approve.confirmInWallet: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet

confirm.lockedWarningDesc: No agent assigned. Disputes cannot be resolved. Funds may be permanently locked if parties disagree.
confirm.deployedOnChain: Your escrow contract will be deployed on-chain
confirm.fundsTransferred: Funds will be transferred from your wallet to the escrow
confirm.sellerNotified: The seller will be notified and can start work
confirm.termsAgreement: By creating this escrow, you agree to the

success.title: Contract Created Successfully
success.description: Your escrow contract has been securely deployed on-chain.
success.savePdfDesc: Download and keep your PDF contract safe. It serves as proof of agreement you can share with the seller, and an agent may require this document if a dispute arises.
success.informSellerDesc: Share the escrow address or contract PDF with the seller so they can review and accept the terms.
success.waitForDeliveryDesc: Once the seller accepts, they will deliver the goods or services as agreed.
success.releaseFundsDesc: When you're satisfied with the delivery, release the funds to complete the transaction.

errors.sellerAddressInvalid: Please enter a valid Ethereum address
errors.sellerAddressSameAsBuyer: Seller address cannot be the same as your address
errors.protectionTimeTooShort: Protection time must be at least {min} day(s)
errors.protectionTimeInvalid: Please enter a valid number of days
errors.agentAddressInvalid: Please enter a valid agent address
errors.agentAddressSameAsBuyer: Agent cannot be the same as buyer
errors.agentAddressSameAsSeller: Agent cannot be the same as seller
errors.agentNotRegistered: This address is not a registered agent
errors.lockedConfirmationsRequired: You must acknowledge all risks to create a locked escrow
